# dx_catalog_relation (Resource)

Manages a DX Catalog Relation definition.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "dx_catalog_relation" "team_manages_github_team" {
  identifier                    = "team-manages-github-team"
  type                          = "manages"
  cardinality                   = "one_to_many"
  source_entity_type_identifier = "team"
  target_entity_type_identifier = "github-team"
  description                   = "Maps DX teams to their GitHub team"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cardinality` (String) Cardinality constraint. Cannot be changed after creation.
- `identifier` (String) Unique identifier for the relation definition. Cannot be changed after creation.
- `source_entity_type_identifier` (String) Entity type identifier for the source side of the relation. Cannot be changed after creation.
- `target_entity_type_identifier` (String) Entity type identifier for the target side of the relation. Cannot be changed after creation.
- `type` (String) Relation type.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the relation.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the relation was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the relation (same as 'identifier').
- `inverse_type` (String) The inverse relation type, derived automatically by the API.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the relation was last updated.
